subject: fix(builder): fix import ordering and type narrowing in FieldPropertiesPanel
body:
- Move OptionsEditor, ConditionBuilder, and THEME_FONTS imports above
  module-level constants — imports must precede all code in a module
- Use post-guard field.id (confirmed string) instead of pre-guard
  fieldId (string | undefined) for updateField calls — gives TypeScript
  proper type narrowing after the early return
- Fix misleading test description: contains operator on arrays uses
  substring match on stringified array, not true membership check

Tags: bug-fix, typescript, testing
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
